# PRD Template

## 0. Document Control
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Product / feature |  |
| Owner |  |
| Status | Draft / Review / Approved |
| Date |  |
| Source materials |  |
| Target deliverable |  |

## 1. Product Summary
- One-line definition:
- Background:
- Problem statement:
- Product goal:
- Success metrics:

## 2. Users and Scenarios
| User group | Context | Pain point | Motivation | Success outcome |
|---|---|---|---|---|

## 3. Scope
| Area | MVP | V1 | Later / not now | Reason |
|---|---|---|---|---|

## 4. User Flow
1. Entry:
2. Input:
3. System processing:
4. Output:
5. User confirmation/editing:
6. Save/export/share:
7. Success state:
8. Failure state:

## 5. Functional Requirements
| Req ID | Requirement | User value | Priority | Acceptance criteria IDs |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| REQ-001 | The system shall... |  | P0 | AC-001 |

## 6. User Stories
| Story ID | Story | Related req | Priority |
|---|---|---|---|
| US-001 | As a <user>, I want <capability>, so that <benefit>. | REQ-001 | P0 |

## 7. Acceptance Criteria
| AC ID | Related ID | Condition | Expected behavior | Test method |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| AC-001 | US-001 | When... | The system shall... | Manual / Unit / E2E |

## 8. UX Requirements
| Screen | Purpose | Main elements | Empty | Loading | Error | Success |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|

## 9. Data / System Rules
| Entity | Fields | Source | Storage | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|

## 10. Non-functional Requirements
| NFR ID | Requirement | Target | Verification |
|---|---|---|---|

## 11. Risks and Open Questions
| ID | Risk / question | Impact | Owner | Resolution needed before |
|---|---|---|---|---|

## 12. Traceability Matrix
| Goal | Req ID | Story ID | AC ID | Task ID |
|---|---|---|---|---|

## 13. Goal Alignment Check
- Original target deliverable:
- Current PRD:
- Match status:
- Missing / risky items:
- Next correction:
